def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    total_sum = sum(nums)
    prefix_sum = 0
    dp_prev = 0
    mod_map = {0: 0}
    for num in nums:
        prefix_sum += num
        mod = prefix_sum % k
        if mod in mod_map:

        current_value = dp_current - prefix_sum

                mod_map[mod] = current_value
        else:
            mod_map[mod] = current_value
        dp_prev = dp_current
    return total_sum - dp_prev

        dp_prev = dp_current

    return total_sum - dp_prev

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:

    total_sum = sum(nums)

    prefix_sum = 0

    dp_prev = 0

    mod_map = {0: 0}

    for num in nums:

        prefix_sum += num

        mod = prefix_sum % k

        if mod in mod_map:

            candidate = mod_map[mod] + prefix_sum

        else:

            candidate = -float('inf')

        dp_current = max(dp_prev, candidate)

        current_value = dp_current - prefix_sum

        if mod in mod_map:

            if current_value > mod_map[mod]:

                mod_map[mod] = current_value

        else:

            mod_map[mod] = current_value

        dp_prev = dp_current

    return total_sum - dp_prev

def solve(nums: list[int], k: int) -> int:

    total_sum = sum(nums)

    prefix_sum = 0

    dp_prev = 0

    mod_map = {0: 0}

    for num in nums:

        prefix_sum += num

        mod = prefix_sum % k

        if mod in mod_map:

            candidate = mod_map[mod] + prefix_sum

        else:

            candidate = -float('inf')

        dp_current = max(dp_prev, candidate)

        current_value = dp_current - prefix_sum

        if mod in mod_map:

            if current_value > mod_map[mod]:

                mod_map[mod] = current_value

        else:

            mod_map[mod] = current_value

        dp_prev = dp_current

    return total_sum - dp_prev

    total_sum = sum(nums)

    prefix_sum = 0

    dp_prev = 0

    mod_map = {0: 0}

    for num in nums:

        prefix_sum += num

        mod = prefix_sum % k

        if mod in mod_map:

        else:

        current_value = dp_current - prefix_sum

        if mod in mod_map:

            if current_value > mod_map[mod]:

                mod_map[mod] = current_value

        else:

            mod_map[mod] = current_value

        dp_prev = dp_current

    return total_sum - dp_prev
